title: text size
description: get number of lines or elements

messages.description: set line number and output its length
pointer to the text if -s flag is used
number of lines or line length

arguments.description: text name if no flags are given

flags.name: -s <symbol, symbol>
flags.description: struct name and field name of main structure

body: "text size" reports the number of lines in the text or the length of a specified line.
